title: tussilago oblongifolia
intro: Tussilago oblongifolia, also known as the Japanese coltsfoot or narrow-leaved tussilago, is a perennial plant native to East Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that provide various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-allergic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The leaves and flowers of Tussilago oblongifolia can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
